name: iFruit Corp.
desc: iFruit is the most valuable technology company in San Andreas and the maker of the iconic iFruit smartphone. With a cult following among Vinewood celebrities and tech workers alike, iFruit commands obscene margins on its hardware.

history.event: Founded in a garage in Rockford Hills by Jonathan Piece and co-founders.
iFruit iMac launch — first consumer hit. Stock triples in 6 months.
Original iFruit Phone unveiled — redefined the smartphone industry.
iFruit Maps catastrophic launch — CEO publicly apologises.
First company in San Andreas to reach $100B market cap.
iFruit AR Glasses announced — pre-orders crash servers.
